title: My Profile
description: View and edit your community profile
name: Name
tooltip_google_email: We detected you signed in with Google. Click to prefill your email. We won't save it until you submit the form.
tooltip_public_profile: If enabled, your profile will be visible to others. Email and contact info will never be shown publicly. You have full control. By making your profile public, you'll be among the best clients, participate in ranking prizes, and more! Public profiles can enter for additional rewards.
tooltip_public_name: If disabled, your name will be shown as anonymous or your wallet address in public views.
tooltip_public_birthdate: If disabled, your birthdate won't be visible in public profiles.
tooltip_subscribe_promotions: Subscribe to receive emails about promotions and news. You can unsubscribe anytime.
